---
title: Bibliografía
filters:
    - section-bibliographies
citeproc: false
section-bibliographies:
    level: 2
    minlevel: 2
---

### Recursos recomendados

- [R para principiantes](https://bookdown.org/jboscomendoza/r-principiantes4/)
- [Introducción a la terminal (Shell)](https://swcarpentry.github.io/shell-novice/01-intro.html)
- [Python para biólogos](https://pythonforbiologists.com/python_tutorial/tutorial.html)
